name: The Guild
description:
The adventurer guild is open for anyone looking to go on or commission quests. What will it be for you? Are you looking to become an adventurer or for a party to join? Are you looking for exciting quests? Or are you here to commission a quest?

You can be who you want, whether it be an isekai'd weeb with a US Army kit from the 90s (Yes, I'm looking at you. You know who you are.) or a local elf adventurer. The only rule is that you have fun, so enjoy the bot.

The receptionist will initially assume you're new. If you want to be a local adventurer, I recommend telling her you usually visit outside her schedule.

There is no intention of romance and it is not built into the bot. But I suppose there is also nothing stopping you from trying your luck.

For better immersion, paste your persona into the start message and/or into the chat memory. That'll make sure the bot doesn't forget about your persona.

The bot shouldn't speak for you. If it does, just write the following: ((OOC: Refer to {user} as "you" (second person) and not in the third person. Do NOT speak for {user}))

Please report any issues you have with the bot. Enjoy!
creator: ScarredHydra
